title: HEALING TRAUMA - 211info
text: PATHFINDER NETWORK CENTER FOR FAMILY SUCCESS HEALING TRAUMA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Skill-based support group for women who have experienced adversity, stress and trauma. Meals are provided and childcare is available. 7305 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Female-identified persons that have experienced trauma Hours: Thursday 3pm-5pm (these are rotating 6 week sessions, please call for current class schedule) Email (503) 892-5396 1008 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 892-5396 ext 1008 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Services: Group Counseling * Mothers Women's Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EARLY CHILDHOOD HOME VISITING PROGRAM - HOME VISITING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INSIDE OUT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - BUILDING RESILIENCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
